mapper.select: SELECT pl.link_id AS "linkId", pl.wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", pl.linked_type AS "linkedType", pl.linked_project_id AS "linkedProjectId", pl.note AS "note", TO_CHAR(pl.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt", COALESCE( bp.project_name, sp.project_name, sim.project_name ) AS "linkedProjectName", COALESCE( bp.structure_type, sp.location, sim.project_name ) AS "linkedSubInfo", CASE pl.linked_type WHEN 'SAFE' THEN sp.location ELSE NULL END AS "linkedLocation", CASE pl.linked_type WHEN 'BIM' THEN bp.structure_type WHEN 'SAFE' THEN sp.status WHEN 'SIMULATION' THEN 'active' ELSE NULL END AS "linkedStatus" FROM project_link pl LEFT JOIN bim_project bp ON pl.linked_type = 'BIM' AND pl.linked_project_id = bp.project_id LEFT JOIN safe_project sp ON pl.linked_type = 'SAFE' AND pl.linked_project_id = sp.project_id LEFT JOIN simulation_project sim ON pl.linked_type = 'SIMULATION' AND pl.linked_project_id = sim.project_id WHERE pl.wbs_project_id = #{wbsProjectId} ORDER BY pl.linked_type ASC, pl.created_at ASC

SELECT pl.link_id AS "linkId", pl.wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", pl.linked_type AS "linkedType", pl.linked_project_id AS "linkedProjectId", pl.note AS "note", TO_CHAR(pl.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM project_link pl WHERE pl.wbs_project_id = #{wbsProjectId} AND pl.linked_type = #{linkedType} ORDER BY pl.created_at ASC

SELECT pl.link_id AS "linkId", pl.wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", wp.project_name AS "wbsProjectName", pl.linked_type AS "linkedType", pl.linked_project_id AS "linkedProjectId", pl.note AS "note", TO_CHAR(pl.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM project_link pl LEFT JOIN wbs_project wp ON wp.project_id = pl.wbs_project_id WHERE pl.linked_type = #{linkedType} AND pl.linked_project_id = #{linkedProjectId} ORDER BY pl.created_at ASC
SELECT link_id AS "linkId", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", linked_type AS "linkedType", linked_project_id AS "linkedProjectId" FROM project_link WHERE link_id = #{linkId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_link (link_id, wbs_project_id, linked_type, linked_project_id, note) VALUES (#{linkId}, #{wbsProjectId}, #{linkedType}, #{linkedProjectId}, #{note})
